title: The Causal Angel
author: Hannu Rajaniemi
description: "[In this third novel, the author] completes the tale of the many lives, and minds, of gentleman rogue Jean le Flambeur, [wherein] we will discover the ultimate fates of Jean, his employer Miele, the independently minded ship Perhonnen, and the rest of a fractured and diverse humanity flung throughout the solar system"--
